description: Scheduled morning briefing (automated run) skipped master-slack delivery. Searched only skills/_manifest.jsonl and reported 'no master-slack skill found' and 'Slack MCP not connected'. The skill lives at .claude/skills/master-slack/SKILL.md and uses Desktop Commander + systems/slack-bot/post.py — not the Slack MCP. This is a repeat of err-20260415-004, err-20260324-002, and err-20260327-004. The correct search path was documented in err-20260415-004's systemic_fix: 'Search .claude/skills/ as well as skills/ when looking for skills.'
correction: David caught the skip. Slack message was sent after correction via Desktop Commander + post.py. Confirmed ok:true to #jarvis.
systemic_fix: This is the fifth logged instance of this failure pattern. The skill location is established. Search .claude/skills/ FIRST for any skill before checking skills/_manifest.jsonl. The manifest only covers domain skills — .claude/skills/ holds system-level skills (master-slack, etc.).
